Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Curtis Christy-Crillo, Esq. appeared for plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation, and the People of the State of California, by and through Dennis J. Herrera, City Attorney for the City and County of San Francisco.
No appearance by defendant Dennis N. Gee, Trustee of a Revocable Trust of August 29, 2997.
Default was entered against defendant on June 24, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed November 3, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation, and the People of the State of California, by and through Dennis J. Herrera, City Attorney for the City and County of San Francisco, and against the Defaulted Defendant Dennis N. Gee, Trustee of a Revocable Trust of August 29, 2997 as follows:

Civil Penalties - $872,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $17,099.50.
Costs - $69.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $889,168.50.

Judgment & Injunction were submitted to and signed by the Court.
